Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
This trait is hidden. Infiltrate this player or gain an intelligence sharing pact to reveal this trait.
Ta cecha jest ukryta. Zinfiltruj tego gracza lub zawrzyj z nim pakt o wymianie danych wywiadowczych, aby została ujawniona.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This trait is hidden. Infiltrate this player, gain an intelligence sharing pact or trigger their preference to reveal this trait.[br/][br/]There is also a chance to reveal their trait when engaging with the other player in diplomacy through one of the following actions:[br/][bulletList][bullet]Making a trade[/bullet][br/][bullet]Insulting/complimenting them[/bullet][br/][bullet]Sending a denouncement or warning[/bullet][/bulletList]

Ta cecha jest ukryta. Zinfiltruj tego gracza lub zawrzyj z nim pakt o wymianie danych wywiadowczych, lub uaktywnij jego preferencję, aby cecha została ujawniona.[br/][br/]Istnieje też szansa, że cecha zostanie ujawniona podczas negocjacji dyplomatycznych z innym graczem wskutek jednego z następujących działań:[br/][bulletList][bullet]przeprowadzenie transakcji handlowej,[/bullet][br/][bullet]wysłanie obelgi lub pochwały,[/bullet][br/][bullet]wysłanie potępienia lub ostrzeżenia.[/bullet][/bulletList]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
The warmonger plays a more aggressive playstyle, focusing their research on weapons and units specific to their race. They aim to increase their colony productivity to build more units.

Gracz wojowniczy stosuje bardziej agresywny styl i koncentruje swoje badania na uzbrojeniu i jednostkach specyficznych dla swojej cywilizacji. Jego celem jest wzrost produktywności kolonii, umożliwiający budowę większej liczby jednostek.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Mercantile players are more peaceful and cooperative, focusing their empire on production and energy. They aim to increase their influence income to better deal with other players and NPC factions.

Gracze o charakterze merkantylnym są bardziej pokojowi i skłonni do współpracy, a ich imperia koncentrują się na produkcji i wytwarzaniu energii. Ich celem jest uzyskanie większych wpływów w celu zawierania lepszych umów z innymi graczami i frakcjami niezależnymi.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
The technologist focuses their research on developing their secret technology, building units of that type and aiming to reach their doomsday weapon.
Gracz o charakterze technologicznym skupia swoje badania na rozwoju tajnej technologii, tworzeniu jednostek tego typu i budowie broni zatraty.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
The operator deploys covert ops to spy on other players and reveal their empires.
Gracz przeprowadza tajne operacje, by szpiegować innych graczy i poznać ich imperia.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
The generalist has no specific focus and employs a balanced play style.
Gracz wszechstronny nie skupia się na niczym szczególnym i stosuje zrównoważony styl gry.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Likes dealing with players that encorporate different ethnic backgrounds in their empire, and is more likely to welcome them into their empire while coming to the aid of settlements. Likes players that help out settlements and players that have good relations with NPC factions.

Ten gracz lubi współpracę z graczami mającymi wielokulturowe imperia i chętniej wita inne gatunki w swoim imperium, gdy przychodzi do udzielania pomocy osadom. Lubi graczy pomagających takim osadom i tych, którzy mają dobre stosunki z frakcjami niezależnymi.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Favors a monoculture empire and is more prone to migrate colonies into their society. Likes players that are at war with NPC factions.
Ten gracz woli imperium jednogatunkowe i jest bardziej skłonny do zmieniania populacji kolonii na własny gatunek. Lubi graczy toczących wojny z frakcjami niezależnymi.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Friend to those with a high capability ranking, and more keen to reach out and befriend players with a high capability ranking.
Przyjaciel graczy mających wysoki ranking potencjału. Chętniej zaprzyjaźnia się z graczami mającymi wysoki ranking potencjału.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Friend to those with a low capability ranking, and more keen to reach out to players with a low capability ranking.
Przyjaciel graczy mających niski ranking potencjału. Chętniej zaprzyjaźnia się z graczami mającymi niski ranking potencjału.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Prefers dealing with players with a high combat ranking and players with a low reputation. Likes players that have defeated other players.
Ten gracz woli zadawać się z graczami o wysokim rankingu potencjału wojskowego i kiepskiej reputacji. Lubi graczy, którzy pokonali innych graczy.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Prefers dealing with players with a low combat ranking and players with a high reputation. Dislikes players that have defeated other players.
Ten gracz woli zadawać się z graczami o niskim rankingu potencjału wojskowego i dobrej reputacji. Nie lubi graczy, którzy pokonali innych graczy.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Prefers to uphold treaties and is less likely to break any, whilst judging those that break them harshly.
Ten gracz woli dotrzymywać traktatów. Jest mało prawdopodobne, że sam zerwie jakiś traktat, i surowo osądza graczy, którzy dopuszczają się takich postępków.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Messages of this player may not always show their true intent. Is more likely to break relations.
Wiadomości od tego gracza niekoniecznie ujawniają jego prawdziwe zamiary. Prawdopodobieństwo zrywania przez niego traktatów jest większe.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Needs little reason to go to war and often fights to the death. Casus Belli trigger a larger opinion penalty. Dislikes helping settlements.
Chętnie wdaje się w wojny i często walczy do samego końca. Casus belli powoduje dużą karę do opinii. Nie lubi pomagania osadom.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Likes good relations with NPC factions.
Lubi dobre stosunki z frakcjami niezależnymi.
Dislikes good relations with NPC factions.
Nie lubi dobrych stosunków z frakcjami niezależnymi.
Nie lubi wojen z frakcjami niezależnymi.
Nie lubi wysokiego rankingu potencjału wojskowego
Nie lubi niskiego rankingu potencjału wojskowego
Likes not having broken any treaties
Shown in the interface when the Strategy trait has not been discovered yet and is currently hidden.
Shown in the interface when the Preference trait has not been discovered yet and is currently hidden.
